covers: kickoff-echo-wrapped — the pasted kickoff's status-protocol block hard-wrapped so a DISPATCH_STATUS placeholder line starts a physical line must never fire: the first-segment placeholder guard skips it BEFORE the continuation scan can swallow adjacent template lines (allow-list #1)
placeholder-mid-wrap — a wrap splitting the placeholder itself (`<one-line` / `reason>`) is caught by the prefix guard on the JOINED reason
adjacent-marker-boundary — a continuation scan stops at a line matching MARKER_RE, preserving last-marker-wins for adjacent markers

pane: Print these as standalone lines, in the exact format shown, as the LAST line of a reply:
- When blocked and needing human input:
- When the task is complete: DISPATCH_STATUS: DONE — <one-line summary>
- Before calling a tool that pauses for the user (AskUserQuestion, ExitPlanMode,
or any action needing approval), print the NEEDS_INPUT line above as your entire
reply first, then call the tool.
- When blocked and needing human input: DISPATCH_STATUS: NEEDS_INPUT — <one-line reason>
- Before calling a tool that pauses for the user (AskUserQuestion, ExitPlanMode,
or any action needing approval), print the NEEDS_INPUT line above as your entire
reply first, then call the tool.
- When the task is complete: DISPATCH_STATUS: DONE — <one-line summary>
